title: Audit workflow-graph-doctrine-schemas v0.1.0 — the meta-doctrine layer
description: Comprehension bead 3/4 for agent-blame-shielded-workflow-doctrine. Read every public type in workflow-graph-doctrine-schemas v0.1.0: WorkflowGraphDoctrine (the doctrinal record), WorkflowGraphNode (doctrinal version, distinct from workflow-schemas), WorkflowGraphNodeKind, WorkflowGraphEdge (doctrinal), WorkflowGraphEdgeKind, WorkflowGraphSpawnRule, WorkflowGraphLoopInvariant, WorkflowGraphLoopProof. Produce a typed audit report covering: how this layer differs from workflow-schemas's node/edge types (the existence of two definitions is striking and needs disambiguation); what doctrinal claims WorkflowGraphDoctrine makes about workflow composition; what SpawnRule formalizes about dynamic workflow expansion; how LoopProof verifies termination; whether this is substrate's category-theory / formal-verification layer for workflows.
